title: Multi-line Printer
description: Print multiple lines of text using a single cout statement with escape characters.
problemStatement:
Did you know you can print multiple lines using `\n`? Print the following message using a single line of code inside your `main` function:

`C++ is:`
`1. Powerful` 
`2. Fast` 
`3. Versatile`
hints: Use `\n` inside your string to move to a new line.
